_comment: Existing Swedish sauna/bath directory sources for harvest-directories.mjs. Add a source, set 'enabled': true once you have verified its robots.txt allows crawling and confirmed the URL pattern. The harvester prefers each page's embedded schema.org JSON-LD (factual business data) and respects robots.txt. Entries below are starting points to verify - do not assume selectors are correct until a --dry test passes.

sources.name: Badkartan.se
sources.note: Large Swedish bath directory. Verify sitemap location + that listing pages embed JSON-LD before enabling.

sources.name: Example listing-page directory
sources.note: Template for a directory that paginates HTML listing pages of venues. Set linkPattern to match individual venue page hrefs.
